code:
import io
import string

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  mut first = true
  while i < n
    mut scanning = true
    while scanning and i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9
          i = i + 1
        else
          scanning = false
        end
      when None
        scanning = false
      end
    end
    if i < n
      mut word = ""
      mut in_word = true
      mut first_byte = true
      while in_word and i < n
        match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(b)
          if b == 32 or b == 9
            in_word = false
          else
            mut bb = b
            if first_byte and b >= 97 and b <= 122
              bb = b - 32
            end
            first_byte = false
            word = "#{word}#{string.from_byte(bb)}"
            i = i + 1
          end
        when None
          in_word = false
        end
      end
      if first
        result = word
        first = false
      else
        result = "#{result} #{word}"
      end
    end
  end
  println(result)
when None
  println("")
end
